overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a tactical character walking through a tropical Bolivian village at dawn. The character moves from dense jungle vegetation onto a dirt road, passes wooden shacks and a monumental Santa Muerte statue, and approaches a shrine building with neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense jungle path approaching rural settlement

events.description: character steps from dense vegetation onto the dirt road entering the village

agents.ego_description: tactical character walking through dense tropical vegetation toward the village buildings

entered.detail: lush green plants and trees surrounding the path on both sides
unpaved dirt trail leading into the village
rustic wooden buildings visible through the morning mist
tall palm trees silhouetted against the dawn sky

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in dense tropical jungle with the character walking through thick vegetation. As the character progresses, the path opens onto a dirt road with wooden village structures becoming visible in the distance through the morning haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt road through rural village with wooden shacks

events.description: white sedan drives down the road toward the character
character moves to the side of the road to let the vehicle pass

agents.ego_description: character walking down the dirt road and moving aside to allow a passing car

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving down the dirt road, passing the character

entered.detail: rustic wooden buildings with corrugated metal roofs lining the road
cars parked along the left side of the dirt road
tall metal watch tower visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the dirt road through the village, passing wooden shacks and parked vehicles. A white sedan approaches and passes by, causing the character to move to the roadside. The watch tower remains visible ahead as the village architecture becomes more prominent.

scene_state.functional_zone: village center with large religious monument statue

events.description: character passes the large hooded Santa Muerte statue on the right

agents.ego_description: character walking past the monumental Santa Muerte statue in the village center

entered.detail: large dark hooded statue with outstretched arms on a pedestal
tall industrial metal tower structure behind the statue

segments.scene_description: The character continues down the road into a more open village center, passing a massive Santa Muerte statue on the right. The area features industrial structures including a metal scaffolding tower, while the watch tower shifts to the left background.

scene_state.functional_zone: village square with Santa Muerte shrine building

events.description: approaching the Santa Muerte building entrance with neon signage
character slows and stops near the building entrance where NPCs are gathered

agents.ego_description: character approaching the Santa Muerte building where several NPCs stand on the steps

notable_agents.action: several figures standing on the steps of the Santa Muerte building entrance

entered.detail: large wooden building with Santa Muerte signage painted on the facade
vertical red neon sign reading MORTE mounted on a pole

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the destination, a large wooden building with Santa Muerte painted across the front and a neon MORTE sign glowing on the right. Several NPCs stand on the building steps as the character slows down and stops in front of the entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic depths of a tropical jungle into the open, neon-lit center of a Bolivian village at dawn. It begins by pushing through thick vegetation until the path opens onto a dirt road, where wooden village structures emerge through the morning haze. As the character advances along the road, the environment shifts to a residential area of shacks and parked vehicles, momentarily stepping aside for a passing white sedan. The scene then expands into a more industrial village center, passing a massive Santa Muerte statue and metal scaffolding before the watch tower recedes into the background. Finally, the camera approaches a large wooden building adorned with a Santa Muerte painting and a glowing neon MORTE sign, coming to a halt before a group of NPCs gathered at the entrance.
